title: Comfy, Cozy & Brickery (Patched)
description: Fork of Comfy Cozy and Brickery by beeshroom with bug fixes and tweaks
body:
This mod is a patched, combined version of the [Comfy Cozy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/comfy-cozy) and [Brickery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brickery) mods, featuring bug fixes and overrall more polish



Changes made to Comfy Cozy:

- Fixed entities having laggy movement
- Added a few options to better configure world generation and mob spawning (plus an option to disable mushroom berets)
- Added a 1/3 chance of a Dirty Pig to spawn with an alternate, unused texture
- Fixed Dirty Pigs not spawning particles when dropping dirt
- Fixed Saddles not being rendered on Dirty Pigs
- Dirty Pigs now become normal pigs after coming in contact with water
- (Hopefully) Fixed Furnace Golems not working on servers
- Fixed the Gapple Lamb secret summon only working when the oatmeal bowls are placed in an extremely specific order and position
- Added a hidden advancement/challenge for spawning a Gapple Lamb
- Fixed Oat Lambs spawning from Oat Plants that aren't fully grown
- Fixed certain advancements triggering whenever your inventory changed (e.g. Comfortable Crafter), without checking the item
- Removed the duplicate advancements present on Husbandry
- Rewrote the Oatmeal Lamb code so it doesn't need to swap entites when changing flavor (difference not really that noticeable, but it took some effort to do soo...)
- Rewrote the ConfigHandler so it uses Config annotations (makes it so you can configure everything in-game)


Changes made to Brickery:

- Fixed the mod crashing on servers
- Fixed the Brick Furnace displaying the name "Furnace" in it's UI instead of "Brick Furnace"
- Fixed the Brick Furnace not conserving fuel and being slower than the regular furnace
- Fixed the Brick Furnace turning into a normal furnace when lit
- The lit version of the Brick Furnace is no longer displayed in the creative mode menu
- Added options to disable and configure the Brick Furnace and to hide flooring tooltips
